title: Sara and Eva — Ep 12: Ginger's Magic Bottle!
logline: Family beach day. While Papa wades into the surf with Eva on his shoulders and Sara starts a sandcastle, Eva spots something glittering in the wet sand — a tiny glowing glass bottle. Inside is a rolled paper note signed by GINGER (the magic-forest fox the family met in ep10): she's stuck on a faraway island and needs rescuing. Papa proposes building an enormous 'research base' sandcastle, the family plans a boat trip, and as the sun sets Sara opens her notebook and starts a 'MAGIC FOREST RESCUE PLAN' map. Cliffhanger camera-ask: Will YOU help us find Ginger? What kind of boat should we build?
formulaReference: Bluey-style 'mystery cold open + sibling rescue arc' — beach setting (visual variety) → mystery-box reveal (glowing bottle washed up) → Ginger callback (cross-episode arc beat 2 of 4: ep10→12→16→20 island reveal) → kid-led rescue planning → Papa-active 15s sandcastle play scene → camera-ask cliffhanger setting up future episodes. Continues the magic-forest creature thread that began in ep10.
durationTotal: ~7:56 (17 normal × 10s = 170s + 1 × 15s = 15s + A 60s + B 60s + C 60s + D 60s + intro 31s + outro 20s)
expectedCreditsBreakdown: 17 normal clips × 90 cr = 1530 + 1 parent-activity 15s clip × 135 cr = 135 + 4 render specs (A,B,C,D) × 90 cr = 360 → 2025 cr base; +25% buffer ≈ 2531 cr realistic ceiling. Over 2200 abort threshold by ~15% (acceptable per ep10 precedent of 2970 cr; user explicitly added 4th MV for playground tag scene per post-ep11 strengthened Papa-active rule).

arc.name: Setup — Sara digs, Papa+Eva enter surf
arc.purpose: Sara starts sandcastle on the dry sand. Papa wades into the surf with Eva perched on his shoulders, both grinning at the waves.

arc.name: Eva spots the glitter
arc.purpose: From Papa's shoulders, Eva sees something shiny in the wet sand at the tide line. She points urgently.

arc.name: AUDIENCE-ASK — Eva picks up the bottle
arc.purpose: Eva placed back on sand, runs to the spot, picks up a tiny glowing aqua-blue glass bottle. Camera-ask: 'Did YOU see what Eva just found?!'

arc.name: Stuck cap — Sara joins
arc.purpose: Sara joins. Both girls struggle with the cork stopper, comically twist and pull together.

arc.name: Note inside!
arc.purpose: Pop! Cork comes out. A tiny rolled paper slides into Sara's palm. Both girls gasp.

arc.name: AUDIENCE-ASK — Eva reads halting
arc.purpose: Eva sounds out the note slowly: 'I am... STUCK... on... a... fa-RA-way... ISLAND... please come find me!' Sara to camera: 'WHO do YOU think wrote this?!'

arc.name: GINGER REVEAL
arc.purpose: Sara turns the paper over. Bottom corner: '— GINGER' with a tiny pawprint. SARA'S EYES GO HUGE. 'GINGER! From the magic forest!' (ep10 callback)

arc.name: Sara runs bottle to Mama
arc.purpose: Sara sprints across the beach to Mama on the beach blanket, breathless: 'MAMA! LOOK!'

arc.name: Eva runs note to Papa
arc.purpose: Eva sprints to Papa at the edge of surf, holding the unrolled note up: 'PAPA! GINGER NEEDS US!'

arc.name: Mama + Papa read together
arc.purpose: Mama and Papa stand together, the bottle in Mama's hand and the note in Papa's. They exchange a look. Mama: 'A magic-forest fox stuck on an island... we need a plan.'

arc.name: 🎵 MUSIC VIDEO B — Magic Bottle Whisper (60s)
arc.purpose: Render B under 'Magic Bottle Whisper' — Eva solo slow-mo wonder at the glowing bottle, designed teal-pink backdrop with floating bubbles. The reveal-magic moment.

arc.name: Papa: RESEARCH BASE!
arc.purpose: Papa stands up, sand on his knees, eyes lit up: 'You know what every rescue mission needs? A RESEARCH BASE!' He grabs a bucket and a shovel.

arc.name: PARENT-ACTIVITY (15s) — Sandcastle build
arc.purpose: Papa + Sara + Eva building the enormous sandcastle research base. 3-beat structure: BEAT 1 digging the moat, BEAT 2 Eva pours bucket of water on Papa's head (peak silly), BEAT 3 all three plant a twig-flag reading 'RESCUE' on top.

arc.name: Finished base reveal + SARA: phase 1 done
arc.purpose: Wide shot: enormous sandcastle research base with moat + RESCUE flag, three figures standing proudly. Sara: 'Phase ONE — done. Phase TWO — the BOAT!'

arc.name: 🎵 MUSIC VIDEO A — Sandy Toes (60s)
arc.purpose: Render A under 'Sandy Toes' — Sara+Eva duo dance with bucket-and-shovel props on beach-pastel backdrop with seashell confetti. Celebration of finished research base.

arc.name: AUDIENCE-ASK — Sunset walk
arc.purpose: Three silhouettes walk along the wet shore at golden hour, holding hands. Sara to camera: 'Where do YOU think Ginger's island is?'

arc.name: Sara's notebook — rescue plan map
arc.purpose: Close-up: Sara's hands on the open notebook on her lap. She writes 'MAGIC FOREST RESCUE PLAN' across the top, then sketches the bottle, an island shape, a dotted-line route, and an X.

arc.name: Eva peeks: tomorrow we build a boat?
arc.purpose: Eva pokes her head over Sara's shoulder, big eyes: 'Tomorrow we build a boat?' Sara nods, still drawing: 'Yep. Tomorrow we... start.'

arc.name: 🎵 MUSIC VIDEO C — Tomorrows Adventure (60s)
arc.purpose: Render C under 'Tomorrow's Adventure' — Sara+Eva twilight duo on sunset-gradient backdrop, holding the notebook + a tiny flashlight. Dreamy wonder before the cliffhanger.

arc.name: CLIFFHANGER + CAMERA-ASK — Will YOU help us?
arc.purpose: Final camera-ask cliffhanger. Sara holds the open notebook page up to camera. Sara: 'Will YOU help us find Ginger?' Eva (leaning in beside her): 'What kind of BOAT should we build?!' Both lean toward camera, eyes huge. Cut to black.
